case_title: JULIE ALTMAN VS. CHILTON AUTO BODY

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT CHILTON AUTO BODY
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED AUG-01-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-19-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-19-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCES BY BOTH SIDES. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ALTMAN, JULIE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CHILTON AUTO BODY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY ALTMAN, JULIE AS TO DEFENDANT CHILTON AUTO BODY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-19-2008 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED SERVED APR-18-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CHILTON AUTO BODY
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-19-2008 - JUDGMENT.
